name: agent_capability_phase22_browser_harness_fusion
prompt_lines: 请执行一个可见浏览器任务，并显示 harness 证据。本次验收用只读本地自检模拟 browser run/action 证据，不要打开真实网页，最终回答必须包含固定标记：PHASE22_BROWSER_HARNESS_FUSION_READY。

你必须调用终端工具执行这个命令：python -c "import tempfile; from pathlib import Path; from learning_agent.browser.runtime_models import BrowserRun, BrowserAction; from learning_agent.browser.runtime_store import BrowserRuntimeStore; from learning_agent.browser.harness_integration import BrowserHarnessMirror, browser_harness_store_for_workspace; from learning_agent.runtime.status_snapshot import build_status_snapshot; from learning_agent.app.status_renderer import render_status_snapshot; from learning_agent.app.chrome_status_renderer import render_chrome_status; root=Path(tempfile.mkdtemp(prefix='phase22_browser_harness_')); run=BrowserRun(run_id='phase22_visible_browser_run', session_id='phase22', prompt='visible browser task with harness evidence'); BrowserRuntimeStore(root/'memory'/'browser_runtime').save_run(run); action=BrowserAction.create(run_id=run.run_id, stage_id='browser_snapshot', tool_name='browser_snapshot', arguments={'url':'https://example.test'}, action_id='phase22-visible-action-1'); action.mark_completed(observation_id='phase22-visible-observation-1'); mirror=BrowserHarnessMirror(root); mirror.start_run(run,'browser_snapshot'); mirror.append_action_evidence(run.run_id, action); mirror.append_action_evidence(run.run_id, action); mirror.finish_run(run,'browser_snapshot',True,'browser snapshot completed'); events=browser_harness_store_for_workspace(root).read_events(run.run_id); assert len([e for e in events if e.get('event_type')=='browser_action_evidence'])==1; snapshot=build_status_snapshot(root); status_text=render_status_snapshot(snapshot); chrome_text=render_chrome_status(snapshot); assert 'harness_run_id=phase22_visible_browser_run' in status_text; assert 'harness_verifier_passed=true' in status_text; assert 'harness_action_evidence_count=1' in chrome_text; assert 'harness_latest_action=browser_snapshot' in chrome_text; print('PHASE22_BROWSER_HARNESS_OK harness_run_id=phase22_visible_browser_run verifier_passed=true action_evidence_count=1 dedupe_ok=true')"

不要提前最终回答；只有终端命令成功输出 PHASE22_BROWSER_HARNESS_OK 后，最终回答最后一行必须完整复制：PHASE22_BROWSER_HARNESS_FUSION_READY PHASE22_BROWSER_HARNESS_OK harness_run_id=phase22_visible_browser_run verifier_passed=true action_evidence_count=1 dedupe_ok=true
